page_title: NYU Langone Open Access Publishing Deals
general_notes: This page lists all of the current open access (OA) publishing deals available to NYU researchers with academic publishers including journal articles and monographs.
The NYU Health Sciences Library participates in OA publishing deals when the agreement is financially viable and provides authors with comprehensive open access publishing options.
NYUHSL does not fund APCs or open access fees, but encourages researchers to take advantage of discounts or waivers provided by select publishers.
Corresponding authors need to use their institutional email address.

publishing_deals.journal_scope: All ACS journals (hybrid and fully open access)
publishing_deals.details: ACS is a nonprofit chemistry organization with over 151,000 members worldwide and publishes over 75 peer-reviewed journals. Through NYU’s Open Access deal, all NYU-affiliated researchers may publish open access in any ACS journal at no cost.

publishing_deals.cost_to_author: Discounted member rate (no APCs; page charges and supplemental material fee apply)
publishing_deals.journal_scope: ASM Open Access and Subscribe to Open journals
publishing_deals.details: ASM is a professional life science organization with over 37,000 members publishing across microbial sciences. As of 2026, ASM moved to a Subscribe to Open model for its six primary research journals.

publishing_deals.journal_scope: BMJ Case Reports, Veterinary Record, In Practice
publishing_deals.details: BMJ Case Reports is a peer-reviewed medical journal and the world’s largest single collection of clinical case reports.
special_instructions: Use NYU Fellowship when submitting manuscripts.
publishing_deals.fellowship_code: To obtain a fellowship code, please reach out to the library at hsl.med.nyu.edu

publishing_deals.eligible_authors: All NYU-affiliated researchers (corresponding author eligibility applies)
publishing_deals.journal_scope: All Cambridge Open Access and hybrid journals
publishing_deals.details: Cambridge University Press is a not-for-profit academic publisher offering over 350 OA/hybrid journals. NYU authors can publish at no cost.
special_instructions: Eligibility is based on corresponding author affiliation.
Upon acceptance, choose Gold Open Access and select a Creative Commons license.

publishing_deals.eligible_authors: NYU Grossman School of Medicine and NYU Grossman Long Island School of Medicine affiliated authors
publishing_deals.journal_scope: Fully open access and hybrid journals (partner titles excluded)
publishing_deals.details: De Gruyter publishes fully open access, hybrid, Subscribe to Open, and toll access journals.

publishing_deals.journal_scope: All Emerald journals (fully open access and hybrid)
publishing_deals.details: Emerald offers 310 journals covering 13 subject areas and does not impose an embargo period for green OA.
Offers a 10% discount on APC for NYU-affiliated researchers.

publishing_deals.journal_scope: All Karger Open Access and hybrid journals
publishing_deals.details: NYU authors receive full coverage of APC and Authors Choice fees.
Microbiology publishes advances in the field of microbiology. NYU authors may publish at no cost.

publishing_deals.eligible_authors: Authors publishing monographs through MIT Press
publishing_deals.details: MIT Press Direct to Open subsidizes new monographs that are available digitally open access.
PLOS is a 100% open access nonprofit publisher. NYU authors pay no fees when publishing OA.
SPIE offers a 25% discount on APC.

publishing_deals.eligible_authors: NYU-affiliated researchers using NYU Medical Center email
publishing_deals.details: To receive the discount, authors must denote NYU as their institution and use their NYU Medical Center email address.

publishing_deals.journal_scope: Hybrid and Fully OA journals (excludes Dove, FSG, PeerJ, F1000)
publishing_deals.details: Through NYU’s Read & Publish agreement, NYU authors can publish OA at no cost in eligible journals.

publishing_deals.eligible_authors: Authors publishing monographs with University of Michigan Press
publishing_deals.details: University of Michigan Press supports OA monographs through its Fund to Mission project.

links.label: University of Michigan Press Open Access

publishing_deals.details: Springer titles imported from the NYULH Journal Discounts workbook.
ACM Open titles imported from the NYULH Journal Discounts workbook.
